parsed.production_notes: The presenter exhibits uncanny facial smoothness, slightly unnatural lip-sync, and robotic head movements typical of AI avatars. The lighting on the subject remains perfectly static despite movement.

characters.appearance: Young adult female with short, side-parted dark brown hair. Fair complexion, dark brown eyes, and symmetrical features.
characters.wardrobe: Light grey button-down shirt. Large black over-ear headphones in the first half.
characters.demeanor: Friendly and informative, but slightly stiff.

scenes.setting: Indoor, daytime. Blurred brick wall and green plant. Bright lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: A woman with short dark hair is centered in the frame, wearing a light grey button-down shirt and large black over-ear headphones. She is looking slightly off-camera to the left. The background features a blurred brick wall on the left and a large, leafy green plant on the right. The lighting is bright and even.

scenes.visual_description: The presenter introduces the app. An animated smartphone mockup appears on the right side, showing various app screens. Text captions are displayed at the bottom.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: If you're an immigrant, you might wonder if native speakers understand your accent.
Character A says: There's a pronunciation app, BoldVoice, that tests your accent and helps you learn an American one with instant AI feedback.
scenes.on_screen_text:

if native speakers

scenes.setting: Indoor, daytime. Blurred brick wall and green plant. Bright lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: The same woman is shown in a medium close-up, wearing a light grey button-down shirt and a small black lavalier microphone clipped to her collar. She is holding a smartphone with a pink marble case in her right hand. The background features a blurred brick wall and a green plant. The lighting is bright and even.

scenes.visual_description: The presenter demonstrates using the app. An animated smartphone mockup appears on the right. She then holds up her actual phone. Text captions are displayed at the bottom.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Theater.
Character A says: Looks like I have to work on that first "th".
Character A says: Theater.
Character A says: I fixed it!
Character A says: It's super easy.
Character A says: Download BoldVoice on your phone.
Character A says: Get your results and let BoldVoice boost your confidence.
